title: Wire Up upgrades section & EP currency
description: Connect static upgrades elements to dynamic game states, add Energy Points (EP) balance stat, and create purchase actions.
notes: EP balance is now stored in gameState.ep, and upgrades are fully interactive. Test suite updated and verified.

title: Add Combat Training Upgrade
description: Create a shop card for Battle Training that boosts player damage in the arena
notes: Successfully designed, developed, and verified through agency test engine.

title: Verification Test of ACP Engine
description: Verify that the new state machine, plan reviews, code checks, and test runner execute without exceptions
notes: Completed after 0 fix retries. Trace recorded in traces/task_003.json.

title: Panda Training Mechanics
description: Implement EP-based training in My Collection to level up individual pandas and boost their battle power
notes: Completed after 0 fix retries. Trace recorded in traces/task_004.json.

title: Red Panda Integration
description: Add Red Panda to basePandas, update fusion recipes to make it obtainable by combining Classic Panda and Inferno Panda, and update codex listings.
notes: Completed after 0 fix retries. Trace recorded in traces/task_005.json.

title: Panda Roster Image Integration
description: Integrate the 9 generated 3D cyber-neon character images into basePandas in app.js, updating list renders, detail modals, fusion selections, and the Battle Arena champion card to display actual images instead of emojis.
notes: Completed after 0 fix retries. Trace recorded in traces/task_006.json.

title: Procedural Fusion Card Art
description: Implement canvas-based procedural image generation for fused hybrids to replace null image fields, and migrate existing saved fusions on load.
notes: Completed after 0 fix retries. Trace recorded in traces/task_007.json.

title: Fusion Lab and Codex UI Image Integration
description: Update Selection Slots, Result modals, Evolution modals, Codex grid list, and Codex details modals to display dynamic character images instead of emojis.
notes: Completed successfully. Code edits verified on 12 test suites, build output compiled, and push PR opened.

title: Static Image Assets for Fusions and Evolutions
description: Generate 24 static cyber-neon character images representing the 12 legendary fusion species and their 12 evolved forms, map all fusions to these assets, and eliminate emojis from the visual interface.
notes: Completed successfully. 24 premium static character images generated/linked, procedural image resolver mapped to static paths, and emojis fully eliminated from UI displays.

title: Gameplay Points & Arena Balance
description: Test the gameplay point system's status and operations. Ensure XP is dispersed and awarded correctly (including Today's Challenge). Make sure Arena opponents adjust difficulty based on champion level/power and can occasionally defeat the player.
notes: Completed after 0 fix retries. Trace recorded in traces/task_010.json.

title: Arena Fractal Moves Menu
description: Design a sci-fi fractal dispersing pop-out menu for Attack and Special buttons in the Arena, generating dynamic champion-specific move names based on name, type, and style, and incorporating them into combat logs.
notes: Completed after 0 fix retries. Trace recorded in traces/task_011.json.

title: UI Holographic Enhancements
description: Enhance Fusion Lab, Panda Training, and Codex views with pulsing energy lines, floating training stats, holographic card flashes, and dynamic type-color glow accents.
notes: Completed after 0 fix retries. Trace recorded in traces/task_012.json.

title: Visual Emoji Elimination Catch-Up
description: Eliminate residual raw emojis from the visual interface (including dashboard challenge card, level up modals, and landing badge icons) and replace them with premium FontAwesome icons.
notes: Completed after 0 fix retries. Trace recorded in traces/task_013.json.

title: Special Move Action Popups
description: Create multiple absolute pop-up windows in different shapes (clip-paths) and small sizes displaying stop-motion high-speed panning action sequences of the selected champion when executing a special move.
notes: Completed after 0 fix retries. Trace recorded in traces/task_014.json.
